name: RnC · Research and Companion
info: Built a multi-role app for owners, vendors, and admins using React Native and NestJS
Implemented real-time chat with Socket.IO and JWT-based role access for 3 user types
Added multilingual support (Korean, English, Japanese) using i18n
Deployed the full app on Fly.io

name: Softvence Agency
info: Built frontend and backend features for client projects using TypeScript, Next.js, and NestJS
Set up CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions
Standardized API structures and reusable UI components across projects
Participated in code reviews and technical planning sessions
